title: Placement Team
headings: Head -  Strategic Partnerships, Alumni Relations, Career Development (SPARC)
body: Greetings from The Placement Office, IIIT-Bangalore! We are delighted to invite your organization to participate in our campus recruitment process. IIIT-Bangalore is a leading institute offering cutting-edge programs in Computer Science, ECE, and interdisciplinary domains like IT & Society and Information Systems. Our students specialize in AI/ML, Cybersecurity, VLSI, Embedded Systems, Data Science, and Networking & Communication, with strong foundations in theory and hands-on problem-solving. They are actively engaged in impactful research—publishing in top IEEE/ACM venues—and work across specialized labs in areas such as E-Health, VLSI Design, Data Platforms, and Digital Public Infrastructure (e.g., MOSIP). We’re confident you will find excellent talent across our M.Tech , MS by Research , and Integrated programs. For more details, visit: https://iiitb.ac.in/placements-overview. Looking forward to a fruitful collaboration. If you have any queries or wish to recruit from IIIT-Bangalor

title: Summer Internship
headings: Call for Applications for IIIT-B Summer Research Internship Programme SRIP 2025
body: Applications are invited from interested students to the IIIT-B Summer Internship Program (SRIP) 2025. This is a unique internship programme being offered at IIIT-B for giving engineering students an opportunity to work on a real-world funded research project. Further details regarding SRIP 2025 are as follows: IIIT-B Summer Research Internship Program (SRIP) 2025 Students who have completed (or completing) 2nd Year in BE/BTech/Integrated MTech can apply. Specific projects may have additional minimum eligibility requirements. Open to IIIT-B students as well as students from other institutions. Internship certificate will be paid upon satisfactory completion of the internship. Where available, stipend will be notified in the internship offer letter. Project mentors will go through the applications and select interns for the project. Project mentors may optionally choose to interview short-listed candidates.  The decision of the project mentors is final. A brief description of the projec

title: To Recruit Degree Programmes
headings: The programmes and specializations that IIIT-Bangalore offers
body: Set up in the year 1998, and promoted by the Karnataka Government and the IT Industry, IIIT Bangalore attracts quality students every year from all over India and abroad, to its acclaimed Integrated M.Tech, M.Tech, MSc in Digital Society and Research Programmes. The institute has a distinguished history of producing high quality post-graduate engineers every year. The 3600+ strong alumni occupy key positions in a number of corporations, delivering tremendous value to their organizations. They have been recruited in wide range sectors like BSFI, Product, IT Services, HFTs, research labs and have assumed diversified positions ranging from SDEs, Member of Technical Staff, Technology Analyst, Technology Consultant in all levels of seniority. Students from different technical and cultural backgrounds come together in the institute, realizing the potential of unity and teamwork. Immense support from the wonderful faculty enables the students to stay on the path of scientific enquiry and toge

title: To Recruit on Campus PGD Programmes
body: Hire Industry-Ready Talent in Product Designer, User Experience (UX) and Product Management Graduates of the Postgraduate Diploma in Digital Product Design and Management (PGD-DPDM) are trained to bridge technology, user-centered design, and business strategy equipping them to contribute meaningfully from day one. The PGD-DPDM program at IIIT Bangalore develops professionals who can conceptualize, design, and manage digital products end-to-end. Through an interdisciplinary curriculum and hands-on learning, graduates gain the ability to: The cohort represents diverse academic and professional backgrounds , making them effective contributors to dynamic, cross-functional environments. Our graduates are equipped for roles such as: These professionals are skilled in problem framing, user research, design thinking, data analysis, and product lifecycle execution. title: Jayachandra  C M
body: jayachandra [dot] cm [at] iiitb [dot] ac [dot] in Jayachandra has over 2 year experience in industry. His specialties include relationship management, recruitment, developing marketing plans, and implementing effective advertising strategies to enhance institute - industry relations. Currently, he is an integral part of the placement office, handling the placement process, preparations, career counselling, and more. Prior to joining IIIT-B, He worked with Bionivid Technology Private Limited, Sun Technology Integrators Pvt. Ltd, and Horticulture Department under Government of Karnataka. He has completed his Bachelors in Science (Biotechnology) and Certificate course (Full stack development) in QSpiders training institute Hebbal branch. His interests are reading, music and games.

title: Roshni DSouza
body: roshni [dot] dsouza [at] iiitb [dot] ac [dot] in Roshni DSouza is a leader with 20 years of experience across industry and academia, currently serving as Head – Strategic Partnerships, Alumni Relations, and Career Development (SPARC) at IIIT-Bangalore. She leads corporate partnerships, career development, alumni engagement, learning and development initiatives, training programs, and team management with a focus on building scalable ecosystems that connect students, alumni, and industry. With her expertise as a counselling psychologist, she has been instrumental in designing mentorship frameworks, advancing institutional wellbeing strategies, and developing impact-driven programs that foster student success and professional readiness. At IIIT-B, she has also led portfolios in further education and short-term programmes (management and finance), innovation center and research department, scholarship office, and event management.
